calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Continued To Dec-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is a petition for final distribution, that the petitioner did not submit a proposed order and is not present. The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to December 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and an Order to Appear will be issued.

Subsequent to the hearing the probate examiner spoke with the petitioner and advised her of the new hearing date and the need for a proposed order. The probate examiner told Ms. Saturov that it was likely that the matter will be pre-granted but that she should check the tentative ruling prior to that date for confirmation. The Order to Appear will not be issued.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
